mechanism: ERP compression supports higher P/E multiples. At current levels (1.0-3.0% depending on methodology), ERP is below post-1990 median, placing forward 5-10 year returns in historically poor territory. The inflation/correlation regime determines whether ERP compression is rational (negative correlation environment) or mispriced.
regime_dependence: ERP compression is justified under negative stock-bond correlation (bonds hedge equities). If correlation regime shifts positive, ERP should expand, compressing P/E to ~18-19x.
